title: Batman4521W's climatakt mod
description: this mod adds nami's climatakt from one piece
body:
this mod adds nami's climatakt from onepiece.
the recipe is 5 iron ingots and 2 iron blocks.refer gallery for more accurate recipe.
the climatakt does not do a lot of damage but when it is right clicked it strikes lightning where the player is looking.
that is the only feature it has for now, i will add more features later.
overall its a fun mod to use.
this mod also has no dependencies.
